title: Z@rubbabel #2216
definition:
Zerubbabel = "sown in Babylon"

 1) the grandson of king Jehoiachin and leader of the first group of
    returning exiles from Babylon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zerubbabel = "sown in Babylon"

 1) the grandson of king Jehoiachin and leader of the first group of
    returning exiles from Babylon

    NASB:  begotten in Babylon, a leader of returning Isr. exiles
